Guillain-Barre syndrome.Definition: A disorder characterized by the body's immune system attacking the peripheral nervous system causing muscle weakness and sensory abnormalities.
Guillain-Barre syndrome.Grade 3: Severe symptoms; limiting self care ADL

Encephalitis.Definition: A disorder characterized by inflammation of the brain parenchyma.
Encephalitis.Grade 3: Severe symptoms; limiting self care ADL; hospitalization indicated

Meningitis.Definition: A disorder characterized by inflammation of the meninges of the brain and/or spinal cord.
Meningitis.Grade 3: Severe symptoms; limiting self care ADL; hospitalization indicated

Neuropathy.Definition: A disorder characterized by inflammation or degeneration of the peripheral nerves.
Neuropathy.Grade 1: Asymptomatic; clinical or diagnostic observations only; intervention not indicated
Neuropathy.Grade 3: Severe symptoms; limiting self care ADL

Peripheral motor neuropathy.Definition: A disorder characterized by inflammation or degeneration of the peripheral motor nerves.
Peripheral motor neuropathy.Grade 1: Asymptomatic; clinical or diagnostic observations only; intervention not indicated
Peripheral motor neuropathy.Grade 3: Severe symptoms; limiting self care ADL

Peripheral sensory neuropathy.Definition: A disorder characterized by inflammation or degeneration of the peripheral sensory nerves.
Peripheral sensory neuropathy.Grade 1: Asymptomatic; loss of deep tendon reflexes or paresthesia
Peripheral sensory neuropathy.Grade 3: Severe symptoms; limiting self care ADL
